The email address of your Pocketbase sup: The email address of your Pocketbase superuser

\nProvide your PocketBase **host URL** a:
Provide your PocketBase **host URL** and **superuser credentials**.

Find your admin panel at `https://your-host/_/`.
Gets all the data for a given collection: Gets all the data for a given collection
Gets a paginated list of records from a: Gets a paginated list of records from a collection
Gets a single record by ID from a collec: Gets a single record by ID from a collection

Updates a single record in a collection: Updates a single record in a collection
Deletes a single record from a collectio: Deletes a single record from a collection
The name of the PocketBase collection: The name of the PocketBase collection
Order attribute(s). Use - for DESC, + fo: Order attribute(s). Use - for DESC, + for ASC. E.g.: -created,id
Comma separated fields to return. E.g.:: Comma separated fields to return. E.g.: *,expand.relField.name
The page (offset) of the paginated list: The page (offset) of the paginated list (default: 1)

ID of the record to view: ID of the record to view
